pins.name: Ferry Dock
pins.summary: Primary arrival and departure point for the island — ferry, dock props, and guest arrival flow.

dossier.overview: The ferry dock is the main transport hub connecting the resort island to the outside world. Research focuses on dock geometry from the show, boat approach paths, and how guests first step onto the island.

pins.name: Main Reception Pavilion
pins.summary: Open-air check-in building beside the pool, with the reception desk, lounge seating, hammocks, and access to the resort’s main paths.

dossier.overview: The resort’s principal arrival building. Haru is led here after reaching the island. It sits beside the pool and contains the reception desk, waiting areas, colorful hanging lights, cushion seating, lounge chairs, egg chairs, and nearby hammocks. The front connects to a garden path, while the open poolside side links it to the central resort area.
